description: CompositionBlue, red and cream check print sleeveless kurta made of blended fabric, has a round neck with a split neckline, ethnic print on the yoke and above the hem, pintucks on the shoulder, flaring pintucks at the waist and a vented hemFitRegularWash careHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleedFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironThe inspiration for this kurta from aneri is the retro-esque fusion of the uniquely ethnic with smart workwear. The modern Indian working woman has come into her own, as has her wardrobe. This piece epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian tunic. For those who want to keep their look classic and chic, pair this with tonal leggings and embellished sandals. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
